_comment: Live loop state. The PM updates this at the end of every tick. Survives context resets.
active_task: awaiting-approval: Library v5 sent (book-feel refine — spine walls now read as real shelved books w/ gold title bands + vintage-leather palette). Delivers director's '책 느낌 더 살려줘'. Asked: lock Library + move to other buildings (Gym = house built of gym equipment), or one more polish. Minor leftovers noted: only 1 base pile visible, front bookmark a touch large.
_paused_note: Set paused:true to make the loop go straight back to sleep without doing work. The kill switch — the user can stop the team without stopping the loop itself.
_escalations_note: Tasks the quality loop could not pass within its round budget. The PM must surface these to the user rather than let them silently look done.
_state_reason: Resumed 2026-07-17 11:22 (tick 33). Director sent a REFERENCE image (lifetown/docs/design/references/library-cottage-ref.png) — 'make it feel like this'. BIG direction shift: from 'a bare stack of books' (v3) to a cozy STORYBOOK COTTAGE BUILT OF BOOKS — walls = rows of colorful book spines, roof = a giant open book ('지혜의 지붕'), open-book window awnings, warm-lit windows, chimney, arched door, warm cozy fairytale mood (warmer/richer than our flat pastel). client-dev ae38e5432a455370b is building v4 (spike-library-cottage-v4.png) in the background, reusing BuildingKit (CreateBookVolume=wall spines, CreateOpenBookCrown scaled up=roof). We are stylized 3D not photoreal — capture form+feeling, not fidelity. On landing: view -> gate -> show director. If good, this cottage-of-books becomes the archetype for other buildings (each a cottage built of its category's objects).
